channelAssessment.timeframe: 30-60 days to launch, 90 days to measurable results

incentive.referrer: Equity credit toward platform investment + recognition at 4Front Symposium
incentive.referee: Priority onboarding + dedicated transition team + waived initial assessment fee

referralProgram.mechanism: Three-track referral system: Partner-to-Partner (practice owners referring peers), Associate-to-Associate (associates recruiting associates), Patient-to-Patient (patient referral program for MODIS implant vertical)
referralProgram.viralCoefficient: Target K-factor: 0.25-0.35 for B2B partner referrals. Patient referral K-factor target: 0.4-0.6 for implant vertical.

tracks.name: Partner-to-Partner Referral
tracks.description: Current SGA partners refer practice owners they know. Highest-trust channel. Incentives: equity credit in SGA platform, recognition at 4Front Symposium, priority mentorship matching for referred partner.

tracks.name: Associate-to-Associate Referral
tracks.description: Associates at SGA practices refer peers from dental school or study groups. Incentives: signing bonus enhancement, CE credit toward Pikos Institute courses, Class A shareholder pathway acceleration.

tracks.name: Patient-to-Patient Referral (MODIS)
tracks.description: Implant patients refer friends and family. 00 credit for both referrer and referee. Activated at Day 30 post-treatment when satisfaction peaks.
tracks.targetVolume: 15-20% of treated patients make a referral

copy.inviteEmail:
Subject: A personal introduction to SGA Dental Partners

Dr. [Referee Name],

I wanted to introduce you to something that has genuinely changed my practice and my life.

I partnered with SGA Dental Partners [X] years ago. My name is still on my door. My team is still in their chairs. My patients do not know anything changed -- except that the billing got better and I started coming home earlier.

The reason I am reaching out is that I know what it feels like to carry the weight of running a practice alone. If you have ever stayed late doing payroll or Googled HIPAA compliance at 6 AM, you know exactly what I mean.

SGA is different from any DSO I evaluated. The education platform alone -- the Pikos Institute, the 4Front Symposium -- has made me a better dentist. And the Thurston Group (38 years, B+ returned to partners) is the kind of PE sponsor that actually delivers on its promises.

I am not getting paid to send this. I am sending it because I wish someone had told me about this option 5 years earlier.

Would a 15-minute conversation be worth your time? I can introduce you directly to our team, or you can take the Partnership Readiness Scorecard first: [LINK]

Either way, no pressure. This decision moves at your pace.

Best,
Dr. [Referrer Name]
copy.shareMessage: I partnered with SGA Dental Partners and it changed my practice. If you are a practice owner thinking about what comes next, take 5 minutes and see where you stand: [SCORECARD LINK]. My name is still on my door. My team is still here. And for the first time in 20 years, QuickBooks does not call me to the back office.
copy.landingPage:
You Were Referred by a Current SGA Partner

A colleague who knows your work thinks you should explore what SGA Dental Partners offers. They are not getting paid to refer you. They are sharing this because it changed their practice.

Take 5 minutes. See where you stand.

[SCORECARD CTA]

implementation: Month 1: Design referral tracking in CRM (HubSpot). Create unique referral links per partner. Build referral landing page.
Month 2: Soft launch to 10 highest-engaged partners. Collect feedback on messaging and incentive structure.
Month 3: Full network launch at 4Front Symposium. Announce incentive program. Provide partners with pre-written referral email and social share templates.
Month 4+: Monthly leaderboard. Quarterly recognition. Annual top-referrer award at 4Front.
kpis: Partner referral rate > 15% of network per year
Patient referral rate > 15% of treated implant patients

partnerProgram.commissionStructure: Revenue share model for dental industry affiliates. Brokers: negotiated per-deal fee (typically offset by broker commission the practice owner would have paid anyway). Content partners: flat fee per qualified referral + performance bonus.

tiers.name: Dental Transition Broker
tiers.commission: Negotiated per-deal (SGA works with brokers regularly)
tiers.fit: High -- brokers control 30-40% of practice acquisition pipeline

tiers.name: Dental CPA/Financial Advisor
tiers.commission: Referral fee per closed partnership + ongoing advisory relationship
tiers.requirements: Established dental CPA or financial advisory practice
tiers.fit: High -- CPAs are trusted advisors in the partnership decision

tiers.name: Dental Industry Consultant
tiers.commission: ,500-5,000 per qualified referral that converts to discovery call
tiers.requirements: Established dental consulting practice with practice owner clientele

tiers.name: Dental Media/Content Partner
tiers.commission: Flat fee per qualified lead + co-branded content opportunities
tiers.requirements: Dental podcast, publication, or content platform with 5K+ audience
tiers.fit: Medium -- content partners drive awareness and credibility

tiers.name: Dental Equipment/Technology Vendor
tiers.commission: Preferred pricing for SGA network + co-marketing
tiers.requirements: Established dental technology or equipment company

onboardingKit: SGA brand overview and three-vertical architecture summary
Partner testimonials and case studies (printable one-pagers)
Financial model overview (non-confidential version for advisor conversations)
Co-branded email templates for broker/CPA introductions
Partnership Readiness Scorecard link with partner attribution tracking

targetPartners.name: Dental CPAs (e.g., CPA firms specializing in dental)

implementation: Month 1: Identify top 20 broker and CPA relationships. Develop onboarding materials.
Month 2: Outreach to top 10 brokers with SGA overview and case studies. Offer co-branded workshops.
Month 3: Launch podcast sponsorship/guest appearance pipeline. Target 2 appearances per month.
Month 4+: Quarterly partner reviews. Track attribution. Optimize commission structure based on conversion data.
kpis: Content partner attributed leads: 10+ per month

communityGrowth.platform: LinkedIn (primary B2B), Private online community (Circle or similar for partners), Podcast presence (guest appearances)
communityGrowth.valueProp: A peer community for dental practice owners navigating the partnership decision. No pitch. No pressure. Just honest conversations with dentists who have been where you are.
communityGrowth.contentCadence: LinkedIn: 3 posts/week from Jensen + 3 posts/week from Ellingson. Podcast: 2 guest appearances/month. Community: Weekly discussion threads + monthly live Q&A with current partners.

contentPillars.description: Content exploring why DSO partnerships fail and how to avoid the common mistakes. Data-driven, honest, not promotional.
First-person narratives from current SGA partners. Before/after arcs. Specific metrics where available. Real names, real practices.
Content about clinical development, mentorship, the Pikos Institute, and 4Front Symposium. Positions SGA as an education-first platform.
Commentary on DSO market trends, valuations, PE activity, and regulatory developments. Jensen as the voice of business analysis.

ambassadorProgram.requirements: Current SGA partner with 12+ months tenure, strong engagement, willing to share experience publicly
ambassadorProgram.perks: Speaking opportunities at 4Front Symposium, priority mentorship matching, LinkedIn content amplification, featured partner spotlight
tiers: Ambassador (participates in webinars and partner calls)
Champion (speaks at conferences and podcasts on behalf of SGA)

conversionPaths: Community Q&A -> Partner conversation -> Discovery call
implementation: Month 1: Launch Jensen and Ellingson LinkedIn content calendars. Establish posting cadence.
Month 2: Secure first 2 podcast guest appearances. Launch partner ambassador outreach.
Month 3: Launch private online community for warm leads (Circle or similar). Weekly moderated discussions.
Month 4+: Scale LinkedIn paid amplification for top-performing organic posts. Monthly community events with current partners.

tiers.format: Podcast co-hosting, keynote co-presentation, byline co-authorship
tiers.description: Established dental thought leaders with conference presence and publication credibility. Not influencers in the social media sense -- these are peer authorities.

tiers.format: YouTube collaboration, Instagram Reel feature, podcast guest spot
tiers.description: Dental professionals with active social audiences. Dr. Grant Olson (138K YouTube) is already a MODIS partner -- leverage his platform for organic content.

tiers.format: LinkedIn thought leadership collaboration, webinar co-hosting
tiers.description: Practice management consultants and coaches who advise practice owners on business decisions.
For MODIS implant vertical only. Local influencers who share dental transformation stories.

influencerCampaigns.outreachTemplate:
Subject: Collaboration opportunity -- dental partnership education

Hi [Name],

I have been following your work on [platform] and your perspective on [specific topic they cover] resonates with what we are building at SGA Dental Partners.

We are a dental partnership platform backed by the Thurston Group (38 years, B+ returned). Our CCO is a practicing dentist (Dr. Mitch Ellingson). We have the Pikos Institute for implantology education. And we are on a mission to change the 7-out-of-10 regret rate in dental consolidation.

I would love to explore a collaboration: [specific format -- podcast guest, co-authored article, content series]. Our goal is education-first, not promotional. We want your audience to walk away with actionable frameworks regardless of whether they ever contact us.

Would a 15-minute call to explore this be worthwhile?

Best,
[Name]
SGA Dental Partners
influencerCampaigns.contentBrief: All influencer content must lead with education, not promotion. The SGA brand should appear naturally in the context of the 7-question framework or partner stories. Every piece must include at least one verifiable data point (85% retention, B returned, 38 years). CTA is always the Partnership Readiness Scorecard -- never a direct sales call.
influencerCampaigns.compensation: KOLs: honorarium + travel + speaking fee. Content creators: flat fee + performance bonus per attributed scorecard completion. Micro-influencers: product credit + flat fee per post.
influencerCampaigns.tracking: Unique UTM codes per influencer. Dedicated scorecard landing pages per campaign. CRM attribution tagging for all influencer-sourced leads.

topTargets.name: Shared Practices Podcast
topTargets.fit: High -- audience is practice owners evaluating options

topTargets.name: Investment Grade Practices
topTargets.fit: High -- focused on practice valuation and transition

topTargets.name: Dentist Money Show
topTargets.fit: High -- financial audience evaluating partnership economics

implementation: Month 1: Secure Dr. Olson content calendar for MODIS organic content. Identify top 5 podcast targets.
Month 2: Book first 2 podcast appearances (Jensen or Ellingson). Launch KOL outreach.
Month 3: First paid influencer campaign with 2-3 dental content creators. Track attribution.
Month 4+: Scale based on CPL and attribution data. Add patient micro-influencer program for MODIS vertical.
kpis: Podcast appearance-to-lead conversion: 10+ leads per appearance
Dr. Olson organic content views: 50K+ per month

audiences.name: Practice Assessment Completers (PA-Hot)
adSequence: Days 1-7: Partner proof story (Dr. Cavendish or Dr. Godat)
Days 31-90: Light-touch nurture (market updates, partner stories)

audiences.name: Assessment Starters Not Completers (PA-Warm)
adSequence: Days 1-7: Complete your assessment CTA with value reminder

retargetingCampaigns.budgetAllocation: 20-25% of total paid media budget allocated to retargeting
retargetingCampaigns.creativeFatigueRotation: Rotate creatives every 14 days. Maintain 3-4 active variants per audience segment. Weekly creative performance review.

platforms: Google Tag Manager (container for all pixels)

implementation: Week 1-2: Install pixel infrastructure (GTM, Meta, LinkedIn, Google). Configure audience segments.
Week 3-4: Launch retargeting campaigns for PA-Hot and PT-Hot audiences (highest-value segments).
Month 2: Expand to PA-Warm and general website visitor audiences. A/B test creative variants.
Month 3+: Optimize based on CPL data. Scale winning audiences by 25%. Pause underperformers.
kpis: Retargeting CPA < 50% of cold campaign CPA
Creative fatigue threshold: CTR decline > 20% triggers rotation
